Manage Ur Wealth - Application Guide
====================================

1. Installation: None required! Just keep this folder together.
2. Running: Double-click 'ManageUrWealth.exe' to start the application.
3. Data Files:
   - transactions.csv: Stores your income and expenses.
   - budget_config.csv: Stores your weekly budget targets.
   - profile.json: Stores your user profile and picture.

IMPORTANT: Keep these files in the same folder as the executable to ensure your data is loaded correctly. If you move the .exe, move these files with it.
